what: Access Acoustic Telemetry Data on Plone Content Management Systems
title: Access Acoustic Telemetry Data on Plone Content Management Systems
text: otndata wrapper around Ocean Tracking Network’s Plone content management system. following data portals nominally supported, though things might work depending optional add-ons used various networks. , bug reports really, really, really appreciated!! Atlantic Cooperative Telemetry Network (ACT) Integrated Tracking Aquatic Animals Gulf (iTAG) Northeast Pacific Acoustic Telemetry Network (N-PAcT) Acoustic Tracking Array Platform (ATAP) MigraMar Northeast Pacific (NEP) Ocean Tracking Network’s development server Pacific Islands Region Acoustic Telemetry Network (PIRAT) following networks supported various reasons: Pacific Aquatic Telemetry Hub (PATH): PATH supported following update version Plone next months. European Tracking Network (ETN): ETN use Plone CMS; see etn R package programmatic access. Great Lakes Acoustic Telemetry Observing System (GLATOS): GLATOS use Plone CMS tool programmatic access data portal; see glatos R package data import, visualization, analysis tools. FACT Riverine Acoustic Fish Telemetry Network (RAFT) use Plone CMS tool programmatic access data portal.

title: Access Acoustic Telemetry Data on Plone Content Management Systems
text: can install development version otndata GitHub :

title: Access Acoustic Telemetry Data on Plone Content Management Systems
text: things can accessed without logging . nodes come pre-baked statistics widget project map:  widget enabled, can access information shown without needing log . can also query projects according code, country origin, species, institution, node, point contact.

title: Access Acoustic Telemetry Data on Plone Content Management Systems
text: ’ll need log access parts CMS using otn_login. package meant interface node’s Plone instance. can switch using network argument. don’t wish enter username password every time, can set credentials system using otn_set_credentials helper function.

title: Access Acoustic Telemetry Data on Plone Content Management Systems
text: can pipe list otn_download save files computer: download directly via URL:
code: otn_extract_files(   project = 'tailwinds',   since = "2026-06-01",   batch_size = 1 ) |>   otn_download() #> ℹ Files saved to ./tailwinds_qualified_detections_2023.parquet. otn_download(   url = "https://members.devel.oceantrack.org/data/repository/nsbs/detection-extracts/nsbs_matched_detections_2017.zip" )

text: can create otndo reports using otn_receiver_summary otn_tag_summary helper functions.

title: Build project namespace — build_namespace
text: project files saved /data/repository/{project}. networks, namely ATAP, MigraMar NEP, directly hosted OTN files saved /data/repository/{network}/{project}. function light cleaning project code adjusts OTN-hosted networks.

Build project namespace — build_namespace

Return files associated with an OTN project. — .otn_files
text: project Character. project code. since Character. Filter files modified since date (YYYY-MM-DD format). batch_size Numeric. number results return. Defaults 25. type Character. Portion URL representing data type wish return.

Note "etn", "fact", "glatos", "path" "raft" accepted, produce error redirect . type Character. Internal data base retrieve.

title: Create summary reports of receiver project data from the OTN data push. — otn_receiver_summary
text: project Character. project code. qualified, unqualified Default NULL: OTN qualified unqualified detections parquet format downloaded data server. argument also accepts character vector file paths qualified/unqualified detections wish download files node use OTN-style Plone CMS. deployment File path user-supplied master OTN receiver deployment metadata. ... Arguments passed otndo::make_receiver_push_summary

text: function creates HTML report can viewed web browser.

title: Create summary reports of receiver project data from the OTN data push. — otn_receiver_summary
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Using only the project code: otn_receiver_summary("tailwinds")  # Providing a local file: otn_receiver_summary("tailwinds", deployment = "my_master_deployment_metadata.xlsx")  # Get a summary fo what has changed since a particular date: otn_receiver_summary("tailwinds", since = "2022-05-01") } # }

what: Search OTN database by project code. — otn_search_code

text: Search OTN database project code.

title: Search OTN database by project code. — otn_search_code
Search OTN database by project code. — otn_search_code
text: code Character. Project code search. Supports partial matching. network Character. Lowercase code desired telemetry network. One "otn", "act", "atap", "itag", "migramar", "nep", "npact", "pirat", "otn_devel" (OTN development server). Note "etn", "fact", "glatos", "path" "raft" accepted, produce error redirect .

what: Installs your OTN username and password in your .Renviron file for repeated use. — otn_set_credentials
title: Installs your OTN username and password in your .Renviron file for repeated use. — otn_set_credentials
text: code adapted tidycensus::census_api_key. Note saves credentials .Renviron, meaning anyone using computer can theoretically access username password. ... use carefully!

title: Installs your OTN username and password in your .Renviron file for repeated use. — otn_set_credentials
Installs your OTN username and password in your .Renviron file for repeated use. — otn_set_credentials
text: network Character. Lowercase code desired telemetry network. One "otn", "act", "atap", "itag", "migramar", "nep", "npact", "pirat", "otn_devel" (OTN development server). Note "etn", "fact", "glatos", "path" "raft" accepted, produce error redirect . temporary Logical. Scrub credentials current session? overwrite Logical. Overwrite previously-stored credentials?

title: Create summary reports of receiver project data from the OTN data push. — otn_tag_summary
Create summary reports of receiver project data from the OTN data push. — otn_tag_summary
text: project Project name wish summarized matched Default NULL: OTN matched detections parquet format downloaded data server. wish download files node use OTN-style Plone CMS, argument also accepts character vector file paths matched detections. can parquet, CSVs, zipped folders. ... Arguments passed otndo::make_tag_push_summary

title: Create summary reports of receiver project data from the OTN data push. — otn_tag_summary
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # You can just use your project name otn_tag_summary("mdwea")  # Or provide an optional date to summarize "What's New". otn_tag_summary("mdwea", since = "2025-11-01") } # }
